audio_script: Hi, I'm Linda. I'm twenty years old. I'm from Canada. I'm a student at a language school. I'm very happy to be here. [pause] My favorite number is seven. Nice to meet you!
Hello, Tom! This is my new room. It's very nice. There is a big bed next to the wall. [pause] There is a small desk and a chair. There are two lamps on the desk. I like it a lot.

questions.question: What is next to the wall?

audio_script: Look at my photos! This is my family. My mother's name is Emma. She is a doctor. [pause] My father's name is John. He is a teacher. I have one brother. We have a small cat. Her name is Luna.

Hi everyone! I am Sarah. My day starts very early. I wake up at 6:30. [pause] I get up and I drink a big glass of water. Then, I have breakfast at 7 o'clock. I eat cereal and I drink orange juice. I don't drink coffee. [pause] At 8:30, I go to work by train. I start work at 9:00. I love my job! What about you? When do you start work?

questions.question: What time does Sarah have breakfast?
How does she go to work?

audio_script: Are you hungry? I love food! My favorite food is pizza. I like cheese and tomatoes on my pizza. [pause] But I don't like onions. They are not good. I also eat a lot of fruit. Apples are my favorite.

questions.question: What is the speaker's favorite food?
What does the speaker NOT like?

audio_script: Hey! It's Friday. Do you have plans for the weekend? [pause] On Saturday, I go to the cinema with my friends. We watch a funny movie. Then, on Sunday, I stay at home. I read a book and I sleep. It's a quiet day.

questions.question: What does the speaker do on Saturday?
What kind of day is Sunday?
